title: Build a broad Express clone from the visible public spec
prompt: Implement the missing Express clone behavior so the visible public monolith spec passes. This repo is a skeletal build scaffold, not a pre-seeded repair task. Use the module structure and visible public test as the spec, and make the shared clone broadly correct across routing, wrappers, request helpers, and response helpers.
golden_patch_description: Complete the skeletal Express clone implementation so it matches the visible public spec and hidden framework semantics.
instance_notes: Build-from-spec Express clone task with visible public monolith tests and isolated verify/hidden evaluators.
